title.en: Extract FerryBox data from NetCDF (THREDDS) to CSV

description.en: Extract FerryBox environmental monitoring data from a THREDDS-hosted NetCDF file. Supports optional filtering by date interval and bounding box. Outputs a CSV containing datetime, latitude, longitude, value, unit, parameter, and derived time fields.

links.title: GitHub repo of NIVA AquaINFRA tools

source.title: source
source.description: THREDDS/OPeNDAP URL to the NetCDF dataset (e.g. https://thredds.niva.no/thredds/dodsC/datasets/nrt/color_fantasy.nc).

save_path.title: save_path
save_path.description: Output path. If it ends with .csv it is used as the output file. Otherwise it is treated as an output directory and the file name defaults to ferrybox.csv.

parameters.title: parameters
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of parameters to extract (e.g. temperature,salinity,chlorophyll,turbidity). Use NULL (or omit) to extract all available parameters.

start_date.title: start_date
start_date.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). If provided, end_date must also be provided. Use NULL to omit.

end_date.title: end_date
end_date.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD). If provided, start_date must also be provided. Use NULL to omit.

lon_min.title: lon_min
lon_min.description: Minimum longitude for bounding box filter. Use NULL to use the dataset minimum.

lon_max.title: lon_max
lon_max.description: Maximum longitude for bounding box filter. Use NULL to use the dataset maximum.

lat_min.title: lat_min
lat_min.description: Minimum latitude for bounding box filter. Use NULL to use the dataset minimum.

lat_max.title: lat_max
lat_max.description: Maximum latitude for bounding box filter. Use NULL to use the dataset maximum.

csv_results.title: CSV output
csv_results.description: Path to the CSV file written by the process.
